patch.content:
## The Origin

SproutLab began in October 2024, a few weeks after Ziva was born. The first version was simple — a single HTML file with a few forms to log feeding times and diaper changes. No framework, no build tools, just a father’s instinct to track what mattered.

The early versions grew organically. Each week brought a new need: sleep tracking when the nights blurred together, growth measurements when the pediatrician asked for trends.

## The Monolith Era

By early 2026, SproutLab had grown into a monolithic single-file PWA exceeding 55,000 lines. Wife Mode made it accessible to Ziva’s mother as the primary daily user. localStorage kept everything offline-first.

## What Was Built

Core tracking across seven domains. A theming system. Data export. Offline-first PWA with service worker. The foundation that every subsequent chapter built upon.

## From Breast to Bowl

Ziva was exclusively breastfed until March 6, 2026. The diet module was built in anticipation of the transition to solids — khichdi first, then gradually expanding.

## Smart Quick Log

The signature feature. A parent could log a meal in three taps: food, quantity, done. Food Favorites learned from history. The Quick Log reduced a 30-second interaction to under 5 seconds.

## Food Intelligence

Beyond logging: nutrient heatmaps showing gaps across days, combo frequency analysis, synergy detection, and an adoption tracker for newly introduced foods.

## Vaccination Intelligence

The medical module started as a simple vaccine log but evolved into a full intelligence system. Reaction tracking captures post-vaccination symptoms with severity and duration. Pattern analysis detects consistent reactions. Timeline visualization shows the full history.

## Growth Tracking

Weight and height measurements plotted against time. Growth velocity calculations detect acceleration and deceleration.

## Supplement Adherence

Ziva takes Vitamin D3 daily. The module tracks the exact administration time — because timing relative to feeding affects absorption.

## The Intelligence Layer

The intelligence module is SproutLab’s analytical brain. While individual domain modules track raw data, the intelligence module finds patterns across all of them.

## Intelligence-Aware Scoring

Every day gets a score using an 80/20 base-modifier split: 80% from five domain scores, 20% from modifiers like consistency, trend direction, and cross-domain correlations.

## Evidence-Based Milestones

506 classification patterns across motor, cognitive, language, and social domains. The auto-promotion engine watches activity logs and suggests milestone transitions automatically.
